mechanism_narrative: Persistently low federal funds rates reduce corporate borrowing costs and compress equity discount rates, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline.

mechanism_narrative: Unemployment rate crossing above 7.0 percent indicates severe labor market slack that suppresses consumer spending and corporate earnings, driving negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Positive returns occur in >60% of triggered instances over a 5-year backtest.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in real GDP and retail sales confirms broad-based consumer demand strength, supporting positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Joint signal yields negative returns in >55% of cases during expansion phases.

mechanism_narrative: A month-over-month decline in the index of industrial production crossing below 98.0 reflects acute manufacturing contraction that triggers short-term risk-off positioning, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next week.
failure_condition: Signal fails to predict negative returns during confirmed supply shock periods with accuracy below 50%.

mechanism_narrative: Consumer price index levels crossing above 230 signal entrenched inflation that forces central bank tightening expectations, compressing equity valuations and generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Returns remain positive in >65% of high-inflation trigger instances over rolling 3-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: Consistent month-over-month growth in total nonfarm payrolls sustains household income growth and corporate revenue expansion, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Rank IC falls below 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window during payroll growth periods.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent housing market activity crossing above 1 million units and robust retail sales crossing above 410 billion dollars indicate synchronized consumer and capital expenditure strength, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next week.
candidate_trigger: HOUST crosses above 1000 and RSAFS crosses above 410000
failure_condition: Combined signal predicts positive returns in <45% of triggered cases during recovery phases.

mechanism_narrative: Divergence between unemployment crossing above 7.0 and industrial production crossing below 99 confirms a demand-driven supply contraction that triggers broad equity sell-offs, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE crosses above 7.0 and INDPRO crosses below 99
failure_condition: Signal yields positive returns in >60% of triggered instances during late-cycle phases.
